title: Smoky Irish Sausage Pie
description: A hearty, comforting pie filled with smoky sausage, onions, and spices. Perfect for a chilly evening.
instructions: Roll out the Irish pie crust and place in a pie dish.
Cook the smoky Irish sausage in a pan over medium-high heat until browned, breaking it up into small pieces as it cooks.
Add the chopped onion and minced garlic to the pan and cook until the onion is translucent.
Season the mixture with salt and pepper to taste.
Spoon the sausage mixture into the pie crust, followed by the shredded cheddar cheese.
Roll out the remaining pie crust and use it to cover the pie. Crimp the edges to seal.
Cut a few slits in the top of the pie to allow steam to escape during baking.
Bake the pie in the preheated oven for 25-30 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown and the filling is hot and bubbly.
